flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at St Philip's College rose 29% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at St Philip's College rose 45% between 2021 and 2024 (8.9k → 12.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at St Philip's College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.1k → $10.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at St Philip's College rose 16% between 2020 and 2023 (54.7% → 63.4%).
